Archive various sources of photos to a file system

Usage:
  immich-go archive [flags]
  immich-go archive [command]

Available Commands:
  from-folder        Upload photos from a folder
  from-google-photos Upload photos either from a zipped Google Photos takeout or decompressed archive
  from-icloud        Upload photos from an iCloud takeout folder or zip file
  from-immich        Get photos from an Immich server
  from-picasa        Upload photos from a Picasa folder or zip file

Flags:
  -h, --help                     help for archive
  -w, --write-to-folder string   Path where to write the archive

Global Flags:
      --concurrent-tasks int     Number of concurrent tasks (1-20) (default 16)
      --config string            config file (default is ./immich-go.yaml)
      --dry-run                  dry run
  -l, --log-file string          Write log messages into the file
      --log-level string         Log level (DEBUG|INFO|WARN|ERROR), default INFO (default "INFO")
      --log-type string          Log formatted  as text of JSON file (default "text")
      --on-errors OnErrorsFlag   What to do when an error occurs (stop, continue, accept N errors at max) (default stop)
      --save-config              Save the configuration to immich-go.yaml

Use "immich-go archive [command] --help" for more information about a command.
